description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a medium-sized bird with a robust body, a short neck, and a slightly crested head. The plumage is predominantly dark gray with rusty brown tones on the breast and underparts, and lighter, almost beige highlights on the face and tail. The beak is short, straight, and conical, well-suited for seed eating. The legs and feet are visible and appear to be a muted brownish color, blending with the overall earthy palette. The tail is moderately long and appears slightly rounded with a subtle layering of feathers. The bird's surface texture is matte and slightly rough, mimicking the natural appearance of feathers.
description: A medium-sized, dark gray and rusty brown bird with a crested head, conical beak, and slightly rounded tail. The surface is matte and textured to resemble real feathers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's full profile, crested head, and layered tail feathers.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded tail and the symmetry of the wings folded against the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bird's beak, crest, and the subtle color gradient along the body.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the bird's face, beak, and the crest atop the head.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid dark gray with rusty brown underparts and subtle beige highlights; slight crest on head.
